gauge.name: Ohio River at Olmsted Lock and Dam Tailwater

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement:
Gauge readings are currently inaccurate due to a downed tree obstruction.
A downed tree in the Pawcatuck river is resulting in data quality issues at the WSTR1 forecast point. NERFC is currently treating this forecast point as if it were iced up until Rhode Island or Connecticut DOT can safely remove the obstruction.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
